title: Business stakeholders
summary: 9609 AS — internal and external stakeholders, their interests, and potential conflicts.
learningObjectives: Describe interests of each stakeholder group.

simpleExplanation.title: Who cares about the business?
simpleExplanation.summary: Shareholders want dividends; employees want wages and security; customers want value; community wants responsible behaviour.
steps: Conflicts: profit vs wages vs price.

sections.content: **Stakeholders** (1.5.1–1.5.2) underpin ethical and strategy questions. Name **at least four groups** with **specific interests**.
